acceptance_criteria.text: Labels table (id, board_id, name, color, position) with UNIQUE(board_id, name); Card-Labels junction table with CASCADE deletes
Cards table gains description, due_date, start_date, checklist (JSON), created_at, updated_at columns — migration non-destructive
Activity table (id, card_id, board_id, action enum, detail JSON, timestamp) with CASCADE deletes
Label CRUD endpoints: GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE under /api/boards/:boardId/labels with position ordering and duplicate name validation
Card-Label assignment: POST/DELETE under /api/boards/:boardId/cards/:cardId/labels with 409 on duplicate, 404 if label not on board
Enhanced PATCH /cards/:cardId accepts description, due_date, start_date, checklist, column_id; validates start_date <= due_date; creates activity entries on changes
GET /cards/:cardId returns full detail: labels array, activity log (last 50), checklist_total, checklist_done
GET /cards/:cardId/activity returns paginated activity (limit 50, offset param), newest first
GET /boards/:boardId/search with q, label, due params — case-insensitive text search, label filter, due date status filter
PATCH /boards/:boardId/columns/reorder accepts column_ids array, reassigns positions, 400 on mismatch
Card Detail Modal: opens on card click, full-width (max 700px), editable title, labels, dates, description with formatting, checklist with progress bar, activity log, close via X/Escape/backdrop
Board card face shows: label color dots, due date badge (red/orange/yellow/gray by status), checklist progress mini bar
Column drag-reorder using HTML5 drag-and-drop on column headers
Search bar above columns with real-time client-side filtering and debounced API search; filter bar with label pills toggle
Label Picker in card detail: dropdown with color swatches, create new label with preset palette, toggle assignment, checkmarks on assigned
All changes in card detail save immediately on blur/change (optimistic UI, no save button)
Empty/edge states handled: empty checklist placeholder, no labels prompt, no activity message, no search results message
